findings.title: coder-scout archived but referenced as active agent in CLAUDE.md
findings.evidence: agents/coder-scout.md does not exist. Only agents/_archived/coder-scout.md and scripts/coder-scout.mjs. CLAUDE.md line 17 hardcodes it in gate1 approve.
findings.recommendation: Remove coder-scout from CLAUDE.md agent-dispatch tables. Document as script-only step.

findings.title: completeness-checker archived but referenced as active agent in CLAUDE.md
findings.evidence: agents/completeness-checker.md does not exist. Only agents/_archived/completeness-checker.md and scripts/completeness-check.mjs.
findings.recommendation: Remove completeness-checker from CLAUDE.md agent-dispatch tables. Document as script-only step.

findings.title: gate-enforcement.js exists but intentionally unwired - dead code
findings.evidence: hooks.json description explains removal: caused false blocks. GENERAL.md line 88 confirms.

findings.title: routing-enforcement.js exists but intentionally unwired - dead code
findings.evidence: hooks.json description explains removal. File exists with full logic but never loaded.

findings.title: conductor-agent-guard.js exists but not wired in hooks.json
findings.evidence: hooks.json SubagentStart lists only subagent-start.js and apply-context-inject.js.
findings.recommendation: Wire into hooks.json SubagentStart, or delete if prompt-level enforcement is sufficient.

findings.title: CLAUDE.md gate1 inline-approve hardcodes agent list instead of reading from run stages
findings.evidence: Hardcodes [coder-scout, coder, completeness-checker] rather than reading run.stages.implement.agents.
findings.recommendation: Read agent list from run stages map instead of hardcoding.

findings.title: file-changed.js probes four payload field names - unconfirmed schema
findings.evidence: Probes payload.file, payload.path, payload.filePath, payload.file_path. Silently exits if none match.
findings.recommendation: Verify actual FileChanged payload schema from Claude Code docs.

summary: 7 findings: 2 HIGH (archived agents referenced as active), 4 MEDIUM (3 dead hook files, 1 hardcoded agent list), 1 LOW (unconfirmed hook payload)
